# Sequence Diagram: Online Trace Flow

**Layer**: Dynamic — Cross-component calls  
**Trigger**: Cross-component calls (cmd → tracer → kernel NFLOG → output)  
**Scenario**: US2 — 用户执行 `iptrace trace` 在线追踪  
**Generated by**: speckit-architect skill  

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant CMD as cmd/iptrace
  participant BD as internal/backend
  participant Tracer as internal/tracer
  participant Kernel as Linux Kernel (Netfilter NFLOG)
  participant Output as internal/output

  User->>CMD: sudo iptrace trace --src 1.2.3.4 --dport 80
  CMD->>CMD: 检查 root 权限（os.Getuid() == 0）

  alt 非 root
    CMD-->>User: exit 2 + "try: sudo iptrace trace ..."
  end

  CMD->>BD: DetectBackend()
  BD-->>CMD: BackendLegacy / BackendNFT

  CMD->>Tracer: StartTrace(filter, backend)
  Tracer->>Kernel: 检测内核模块 xt_LOG / nf_log_ipv4

  alt 模块未加载
    Tracer-->>CMD: 错误：模块缺失
    CMD-->>User: exit 2 + "sudo modprobe xt_LOG"
  end

  Tracer->>Kernel: 绑定 AF_NETLINK / NETLINK_NETFILTER socket
  Tracer->>Kernel: 注入 xt_TRACE 规则（raw 表，携带 iptrace-trace 注释标记）

  Note over Tracer,Kernel: 追踪会话开始（≤3s 内应出现第一条输出，满足 SC-003）

  loop 实时事件循环（直到 Ctrl+C 或 --timeout 到期）
    Kernel->>Tracer: NFLOG 消息（NFULA_PREFIX + NFULA_PACKET_HDR）
    Tracer->>Tracer: 解析 TLV 属性 → TraceStep
    Tracer->>Tracer: 过滤（按五元组条件）
    alt 匹配过滤条件
      Tracer->>Output: StreamStep(step, format)
      Output-->>User: 实时输出一行（human）或一行 NDJSON
    end
  end

  User->>CMD: Ctrl+C（SIGINT）
  CMD->>Tracer: Stop()
  Tracer->>Kernel: 清理 xt_TRACE 规则（defer 保证即使 panic 也执行）
  Tracer->>Kernel: 关闭 netlink socket
  CMD-->>User: exit 0
```
